# API Checklist: Deduplicate open-data entities

**Purpose**: Validate deduplication API contracts for triggering runs and inspecting status.
**Created**: 2026-03-11
**Feature**: `specs/021-deduplicate-open-data/spec.md`

**Note**: This checklist is generated by the `/prompts:speckit.checklist` workflow.

## Trigger Contract

- [x] CHK-API-001 Endpoint accepts manual or scheduled trigger and entity types.
- [x] CHK-API-002 Request validation rejects invalid entity types.

## Status Contract

- [x] CHK-API-003 Status response includes QA summary and candidate counts.
- [x] CHK-API-004 Status response includes run identifiers and timestamps.

## Failure States

- [x] CHK-API-005 Failure responses include actionable error details.
- [x] CHK-API-006 Publication failures do not present production as updated.
